betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Logistics Drones§f

§aSmart drones that automatically detect provider and requester crates in a network!§f

§bLogistics Drones§f work differently from transport drones — they automatically form networks and detect crates within a §e5§f chunk radius. They move at §e7.5§f blocks/s (same as basic transport drones).

§6Components§f:
§b• Logistics Drone Dock§f: holds up to §e9§f drones
§b• Provider Crate§f: provides items to the network
§b• Requester Crate§f: requests specific items (set filters)
§b• Waypoints§f: extend range or avoid obstacles

§6Crafting§f:
§b• Logistics Drone§f: Microchip + Transport Drone → 1 drone
§b• Dock§f: Steel Crate + Military Grade Circuit Board → dock
§b• Provider Crate§f: Waypoint + Steel Crate + Blue Crayon → provider
§b• Requester Crate§f: Waypoint + Steel Crate + Yellow Crayon → requester

§eTip§f: Unlike transport drones, logistics drones auto-detect crates — no manual route programming needed! Just place a dock with drones, a provider crate, and a requester crate, and they handle the rest.
